body:
A broken garage door spring is a massive headache—it makes the door completely deadweight and usually traps your car inside. [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Broken%20torsion%20spring%20was%20swapped,spring%20replaced%2C%20system%20running%20again.)

 * **Why them:** They offer 24/7 emergency response in the Pleasanton area and focus specifically on same-day service calls to get your door operational immediately. [Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.grahamgaragedoors.net/city/pleasanton-california)

### ⚠️ Important Safety & Cost Tips Before You Call

  1. **Do Not Try to Open the Door Manually:** Trying to force a double-wide garage door open with a broken spring can severely damage your garage door opener or cause the door to crash down, causing injury.

  2. **Replace Both Springs:** If your door uses a two-spring system (common on double-car garages) and only one broke, **replace both**. They have the same lifespan, meaning the second one will likely snap shortly after the first. Doing both now saves you a second service fee.

  3. **Confirm the Warranty:** Reputable companies (like Precision and Valiant) typically offer warranties ranging from 3 to 10 years on high-cycle garage springs. Be sure to ask what is included before they begin.
